name: Anomalous Resonance
reasoning: V2 best captures the prompt's core elements: visible energy waves rippling through the chamber, suspended metallic artifacts (gears, crystals) clearly vibrating in the central light beam, and excellent geometric composition with strong focal point. The cool steel-blue and teal palette with screen-glow lighting is perfectly executed. V1 has a watermark artifact at the bottom and lacks distinct metallic objects. V3 features organic vine-like energy patterns that don't match the "rippling waves" and "geometric composition" requirements, feeling more botanical than mechanical.

artifacts_found.issue: Watermark/text artifact visible at bottom of image
Organic vine-like energy patterns don't match geometric composition requirement; lacks clear metallic artifacts like gears and crystals
